info.title: EspritMarket API
info.description: Complete API documentation for EspritMarket platform

put.summary: Replace all templates for a provider (optionally for a specific service)

get.summary: Get map tracking record by id
Download permit image for authenticated courier

put.summary: Upload permit image for authenticated courier

get.summary: Get interview date (day and hour) for a courier

put.summary: Update interview date (day and hour) for a courier

post.summary: Create interview date (day and hour) for a courier

delete.summary: Delete interview date for a courier

get.summary: List service mandates for a provider
List all templates for a provider

post.summary: Submit a new seller request with student card file
Reset password using email and 5-digit code

400.description: User already exists, invalid input, or restricted role

post.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token
Send a 5-digit reset code by email

get.summary: Check if service is in user's favorites
Get available time slots for a service (public)
List global (default) templates for a provider
List exceptions for a date range
Get seller request status by user ID query param
Get seller request status by user ID
Get route details between two points for map drawing
Get travel distance and duration between two points
Get Google Maps backend configuration status
List couriers for admin delivery table

BasicAuth.description: HTTP Basic Authentication - use email:password (base64 encoded)
